fields.label: Rate Code
fields.description: Short alphanumeric code identifying this rate plan (e.g. BAR, CORP-ACME, WKD-PKG). Used for rate lookups and snapshots on reservations.

fields.label: Rate Type
fields.description: Human-readable rate category name (e.g. Best Available Rate, Corporate Rate, Weekend Package). Displayed on folios and reports.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Brief description of this rate for front-desk reference.

fields.label: Market Segment
fields.options:
BAR
Corporate
OTA
Government
Weekend
Promo
Negotiated
House Use
Complimentary
fields.description: Market segment this rate belongs to. Used for revenue analysis and channel-eligibility filtering.

fields.label: Charge Plan
fields.description: Whether this rate is charged per night (Daily) or per hour (Hourly).

fields.label: Default Rate
fields.description: When checked, this rate is the system fallback for the matching market segment when no specific rate code is selected.

fields.label: Active
fields.description: Only active rates are offered during reservation creation.

fields.label: Minimum Stay (Nights)
fields.description: Minimum number of nights required to qualify for this rate. 0 = no minimum.

fields.label: Maximum Stay (Nights)
fields.description: Maximum number of nights allowed at this rate. 0 = no maximum.

fields.label: Valid From
fields.description: Date from which this rate is applicable. Blank = no start restriction.

fields.label: Valid To
fields.description: Last date on which this rate is applicable. Blank = no end restriction.

fields.label: Days (Legacy)
fields.description: Legacy field preserved for backward compatibility.

fields.label: Meal Plan
fields.options:
Room Only
Bed & Breakfast
Half Board
Full Board
fields.description: Meals included in this rate. Snapshotted onto each Hotel Reservation Room row at booking time.

fields.label: Cancellation Policy
fields.description: Terms governing cancellations for bookings made under this rate (e.g. free cancellation up to 24h before arrival; 1-night penalty thereafter). Snapshotted onto reservations.

fields.label: Channel Eligibility
fields.description: Which booking channels can offer this rate. All unchecked = no channel restrictions (rate is available everywhere).

fields.label: Front Desk
fields.description: Rate is available for Front Desk / staff-initiated reservations.

fields.label: Corporate
fields.description: Rate is available for Corporate account reservations.

fields.label: OTA
fields.description: Rate is loadable by Online Travel Agency channels.

fields.label: Walk In
fields.description: Rate is available for same-day Walk In bookings.
